prompt_en: Cinematic Korean apocalypse opening for CH09 연기 저장고. checkpoint pursuit, diesel smoke, official line versus detour line, compressing corridors. Location mood: 연료 저장 탱크 구역, 배터리 적재장, 연기 배출 제어실. Show route pressure, practical survival gear, and incoming threat 연기 창고군. Grounded realism, no fantasy.
prompt_ko_context: 호송 인원과 연료 적재를 동시에 맞춘다.
camera_notes: medium lens, forward pressure, linear escape framing. Start wide, move into corridor pressure, end on route decision beat.
audio_notes: Base cue red_corridor. Layer alarm pulses, crowd pressure ambience, and metallic reverb.
